title: Mildly Smoky Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: A briny and velvety post-workout Mediterranean dish featuring sansho and a smoky flavor, this recipe is perfect for a healthy dinner option.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, sansho pepper, smoked paprika, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley and lemon wedges.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for up to 3 days.
